ModMetaData.name: [STL]Satellite Inc Mod
ModMetaData.author: StellarSatellite
ModMetaData.description:
[STL]Satellite Inc mod ver 0.11.3
This mod adds multiple weapons, armor(WIP), and shield belts.
To install this mod, you must have Astrallium Core installed.
This allows the guns added by this mod to penetrate pawns, walls, and other obstacles to inflict damage. In addition, you can choose from several firing modes; the default is single-shot. However, be aware that the accuracy of the guns in this mod will vary depending on the Pawn's mood.
This mod works on its own, but installing [STL]Roren-CeleTech and Satellite Inc ShieldsBelts Patches" will allow you to equip the added shield belts to Lauren. Also, although it's still under development, we plan to give these items to the pawns that appear in Satellite Inc. Wolfein Race(WIP).
Astrallium Core https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3709550384
Roren-CeleTech and Satellite Inc ShieldsBelts Patches https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3708220495
